visual_description: Through a gold-framed window, an older man with white hair in a black shirt sits opposite a younger man in a suit, both facing a large ornate mural of a deity; the older man leans forward and appears to speak while the younger man listens attentively. A golden statue stands to the right of the mural, and a sign with Chinese characters is visible on the left wall.
audio_description: The audio is quiet with a faint, indistinct conversation between the two men.
